chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.Misc.A.No.S-169 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01. For orders on office objection “A” 02. For orders on M.A.No.2791/2019 (E/A) 03. For hearing of main case. 11.05.2020. Mr.Athar Abbas Solangi, Advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Noonari, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant does not press the instant Crl.Misc.Application; it is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E
